_note: Builder-prompt eval corpus. buildFiles are relative to the Tests/ dir (the validated build cwd). oracle maps each produced .pr (relative to Tests/) to {goalName: [[expected module.action per step], ...]}. Each step's expected list includes modifiers flattened in (e.g. ['goal.call','error.handle']). Pass = produced == expected exactly. Seed corpus = BuilderSanity (already in-tree). Hard-construct cases (error.handle nesting, llm.query+%!data%, cache.wrap) get added under Tests/BuilderHarness/ next.
